name: AnderKant 2
short_description: Get ready for AnderKant 2, with more dreamy visuals and great music to inspire your soul while you're pondering about your next project or journey. Prepare to explore 7 abstract environments with 7 tracks each carefully crafted for a unique vibe for each world.
detailed_description:
Get ready for AnderKant 2, sequel to the first project with improved visuals and brand new music tracks! The intention of this project is not about specific goals or story, but rather audio/visual pieces anyone can enjoy at their own pace and choosing.

Genre of this title would be considered a "Walking-Simulator" or "Interactive Visualizer" according to a Steam Curator's experience with the first game.

Key Features:

7 Uniquely designed 3D worlds to explore in first person mode each with its own vibe.

7 Breathtaking electronic music tracks to listen to while you wonder around.

Album containing 8 tracks (including the Menu Theme) that can purchased separately.

Controls:

Movement: W-A-S-D/Arrows

Look Around: Mouse/Pad Movement:

Speed up: Shift

Jump: Space-bar

Choose Scene: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

Exit Program: Esc

Main Menu/Restart: 8
